videos.headline: Clifford gets benched after Nebraska's scoop-and-score TD
videos.description: Deontai Williams sacks Sean Clifford, causing him to fumble the ball, and Williams runs it in for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Clifford gets benched after Nebraska's scoop-and-score TD) 2020/11/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Penn State still winless after comeback vs. Nebraska comes up short
videos.description: Penn State falls to 0-4 and Nebraska gets its first win of the season after holding off the Nittany Lions for a 30-23 win.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Penn State still winless after comeback vs. Nebraska comes up short) 2020/11/14 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Betts jets into the end zone for 45-yard Nebraska TD
videos.description: Zavier Betts finds an opening and charges into the end zone for the score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Betts jets into the end zone for 45-yard Nebraska TD) 2020/11/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Playmaking runs in the McCaffrey family
videos.description: Luke McCaffrey, the brother of Panthers RB Christian McCaffrey, has no other option but to scramble and switch hands to throw left-handed.

videos.headline: Lee breaks through for 31-yard Penn State TD
videos.description: Keyvone Lee finds a wide-open lane and runs into the end zone for a 31-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: Penn State's 74-yard reception leads to TD
videos.description: Will Levis connects with Pat Freiermuth for a 74-yard gain, setting up Devyn Ford to run in a 5-yard touchdown a few plays later.
